title: Weak Authentication Mechanism
description: The system lacks detailed information about its authentication mechanisms. This could lead to attackers bypassing authentication controls through brute-force attacks, credential stuffing, or exploiting vulnerabilities in the authentication process itself.  Without knowing the authentication protocols used (e.g., basic authentication, OAuth), the potential for compromise is significant.
attack_vector: Exploitation of vulnerabilities in the authentication service, brute-force attacks targeting weak passwords, or credential theft via phishing.
mitigations: Implement Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) for all user accounts.
Enforce strong password policies (minimum length, complexity, regular password changes).
Regularly audit authentication logs for suspicious activity and implement intrusion detection systems.
